status.nasDirChangedDetail: Sync is blocked. Restore the previous directory path or reset sync history in settings.
status.manualSyncRequiredDetail: Auto-sync paused after keep both conflict resolution

notice.signInBeforeSync: Sign in to UGREEN NAS before syncing.
notice.signInBeforeConflicts: Sign in to UGREEN NAS before resolving conflicts.
notice.autoSyncPreconditions: Sign in and set a NAS sync directory before enabling auto-sync.
notice.checkNasAccessFailed: Could not check NAS sync directory access: {{error}}
notice.autoSyncDisabled: To prevent data corruption while changing settings. Auto-sync has been turned off
notice.couldNotOpenSettings: Could not open UGREEN sync settings.
notice.resetHistory: UGREEN sync history reset. Files were not deleted.
notice.noConflicts: No unresolved UGREEN sync conflicts found.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.nasSyncDirDesc: The plugin creates this directory on the NAS if it does not exist.
settings.autoSyncPending: Local changes have not synced yet.
settings.autoSyncPendingSince: Local changes since {{time}} have not synced yet.
settings.autoSyncIntervalDesc: How often automatic sync runs while auto-sync is enabled.
settings.conflictResolverDesc: Conflicted files are stored in .conflicts. You can resolve them using the resolver, or manually clear out the .conflicts folder.
settings.neverSynced: This vault has not synced yet.
settings.syncBlockedNasDir: Sync is blocked because the NAS directory was changed. Restore it to "{{path}}" or reset sync history in Actions.
settings.showDiagnosticsDesc: Turn this off to hide diagnostics settings again.
settings.debugLoggingDesc: Log sync decisions and file operations to the developer console.

modal.resetHistoryLine2: Without a sync state, the next sync will perform a conservative two-way sync. Files that exist on only one side will be copied to the other side, and files that exist on both sides will be compared by content.
modal.resetHistoryLine3: Any content difference will be treated as a conflict and saved to the .conflicts folder.
modal.logoutLine1: You will be signed out and the session will be cleared.
modal.logoutLine2: Auto-sync and any pending sync operations will be cancelled. You will need to sign in again before syncing.

login.title: Sign in to UGREEN NAS
login.httpWarning: Files may be visible to others on the same network. Only use http on trusted networks. UGREENlink is recommended.
login.connectionTypeDesc: Choose how to connect to your UGREEN NAS.
login.nasAddressDesc: Enter the hostname or IP address of your NAS.
login.passwordDesc: Used only for this sign-in and not saved by the plugin.
login.authCodeDesc: Use the current one-time code from your authenticator app.
login.enterNextCode: Enter the next authenticator code and try again.
login.authCodeFailed: Authenticator code could not be verified. Enter a new code and try again.

conflicts.title: Resolve sync conflicts
conflicts.conflictPromptLine1: UGREEN sync can not proceed while files remain in .conflicts.
conflicts.keepBothSelected: {{count}} files selected to keep both versions.
conflicts.resolveAndSyncIncomplete: Resolve and sync is disabled until every conflict file has a choice. You can resolve selected files now and resolve the rest later.
conflicts.resolveAndSyncKeepBoth: Resolve and sync is disabled because keep both needs manual review. Select Resolve, review the copied files, then sync manually.

browser.title: Choose NAS sync directory
browser.addVaultNameDesc: Append {{vaultName}} to the selected NAS folder.

error.signInBeforeSync: Sign in to UGREEN NAS before syncing.
error.sessionExpired: UGREEN NAS session expired. Sign in again before syncing.
error.noAccessibleRoots: UGREEN NAS did not report any accessible root folders.
error.useBrowseToChoose: Use Browse to choose an accessible NAS sync directory.
error.uploadVerificationFailed: Remote upload verification failed for {{localPath}}: expected {{expected}} bytes, got {{actual}} bytes.
error.pathOutsideSyncDir: Remote path is outside sync directory: {{path}}
error.connectionRequired: NAS address or UGREENlink ID is required.
error.unresolvedConflicts: Unresolved sync conflicts exist in .conflicts. Resolve them before syncing again.
